name: Cane Corso Breed Reference Geometry
source: FCI Standard No. 343 — Cane Corso Italiano

proportions.label: Body length / height at withers
proportions.app_use: Side-body photo geometry and future landmark comparison

proportions.label: Head length / height at withers
proportions.app_use: Head/body proportion reference for photo review

proportions.label: Muzzle length / skull length
proportions.app_use: Head-profile review; the muzzle is shorter than the skull

proportions.label: Chest depth / height at withers
proportions.app_use: Side-body photo geometry and visual substance orientation

safety_boundary: This layer compares visible measurements with reference geometry only. It does not prove pedigree, breed purity, official registry status or health status.
